name: Matt Dirkx Golf Instruction
about: Matt Dirkx Golf Instruction provides personalized golf coaching services across multiple locations in Iowa. The operation specializes in private lessons, short game programs, and junior coaching, with a focus on making golf approachable and fun for all skill levels. Key locations include Elevation Golf Club, which features high-end Trackman simulators and a 6,000 square foot short-game area, and an Ingersoll indoor facility simulator, as well as in-home lessons for clients with their own simulators. Instruction combines technical and mental game assessments using video analysis, personalized drills, and follow-up notes to help golfers improve and make the game more enjoyable.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to high-end Trackman simulators for detailed swing analysis
Personalized lesson plans with video follow-up and customized drills
Multiple convenient locations including indoor facilities and in-home options
Focus on both technical and mental aspects of the game for comprehensive improvement
Specialized short game area with putting green and sand trap at Elevation Golf Club

simulator_hardware.notes: High-end Trackman golf simulators available at Elevation Golf Club

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify, but it's recommended to bring your own clubs for lessons. For in-home lessons, you would use your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website doesn't mention food or drink services, suggesting it may be BYOB, but this isn't explicitly confirmed.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify timing for 18-hole simulations, but lesson durations would depend on the specific package booked.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers specific junior lessons for golfers 18 and under or college students, with specialized coaching for high school players preparing for teams and tournaments.
